results.description: DESCRIPTION:THE PROPOSED PROJECT WILL DEMONSTRATE THE EFFECTIVENESS OF FARM RUNOFF TREATMENT SYSTEMS IN REDUCING NUTRIENT DISCHARGES TO COASTAL WATERWAYS AND PROVIDE A BLUEPRINT FOR SCALING-UP TREATMENT SYSTEMS WITHIN TWO KEY AGRICULTURAL WATERSHEDS OF THE MONTEREY BAY, CA. IN ADDITION, THIS PROJECT WILL EXAMINE THE POTENTIAL LINK BETWEEN AGRICULTURAL NUTRIENT DISCHARGES AND THE GROWTH OF HARMFUL ALGAL BLOOMS (HABS).ACTIVITIES:..SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:..

DESCRIPTION:
THE PROPOSED PROJECT WILL DEMONSTRATE THE EFFECTIVENESS OF FARM RUNOFF TREATMENT SYSTEMS IN REDUCING NUTRIENT DISCHARGES TO COASTAL WATERWAYS AND PROVIDE A BLUEPRINT FOR SCALING-UP TREATMENT SYSTEMS WITHIN TWO KEY AGRICULTURAL WATERSHEDS OF THE MONTEREY BAY, CA. IN ADDITION, THIS PROJECT WILL EXAMINE THE POTENTIAL LINK BETWEEN AGRICULTURAL NUTRIENT DISCHARGES AND THE GROWTH OF HARMFUL ALGAL BLOOMS (HABS).

THE PROPOSED PROJECT WILL DEMONSTRATE THE EFFECTIVENESS OF FARM RUNOFF TREATMENT SYSTEMS IN REDUCING NUTRIENT DISCHARGES TO COASTAL WATERWAYS AND PROVIDE A BLUEPRINT FOR SCALING-UP TREATMENT SYSTEMS WITHIN TWO KEY AGRICULTURAL WATERSHEDS OF THE MONTEREY BAY, CA. IN ADDITION, THIS PROJECT WILL EXAMINE THE POTENTIAL LINK BETWEEN AGRICULTURAL NUTRIENT DISCHARGES AND THE GROWTH OF HARMFUL ALGAL BLOOMS (HABS).
